overall.description: A first-person walk through a cyberpunk city at dusk, featuring neon-lit streets, wet reflective pavement, and futuristic architecture. The footage is from a video game (Cyberpunk 2077), showcasing a journey from a covered walkway through open streets to an intersection crossing.

segments.scene_description: Walking beneath a massive concrete highway overpass with wet reflective pavement. The area is dimly lit with mixed lighting from neon signs above. Pedestrians walk in opposing directions along the narrow covered walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit commercial street with towering buildings

events.description: camera tilts upward to view tall building facades and neon signage
passing pink cylindrical neon advertisement structure on left

entered.detail: tall building with vertical red neon accent lighting and multiple digital displays

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the covered walkway into an open street bathed in neon light. The camera tilts up to reveal a towering red highrise covered in digital billboards. A pink cylindrical advertisement glows on the left while an elevated pedestrian bridge spans the street ahead.

events.description: turning right at intersection to cross the street
crossing multi-lane road while vehicles pass by

agents.ego_description: turning right at intersection and crossing the street amidst light traffic

segments.scene_description: Approaching a major intersection with wide crosswalks. The camera turns right to cross the multi-lane street as vehicles pass by. A prominent vertical digital billboard displays a pink neon figure near the crossing area.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with large wall murals

events.description: approaching crosswalk and waiting for pedestrians to cross

agents.ego_description: walking along new street segment and stopping at crosswalk

notable_agents.action: two people crossing toward camera on yellow striped crosswalk

entered.detail: tall building with massive illuminated wall advertisements and neon text
wide pedestrian crossing with bold yellow stripes

segments.scene_description: Walking along a new street segment lined with buildings featuring massive illuminated murals. The camera approaches a yellow zebra crosswalk where pedestrians are crossing, and stops to wait. The overhead pedestrian bridge is now visible in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a dim, sheltered underpass into the expansive, neon-drenched heart of a futuristic city. It begins beneath a massive concrete highway overpass, moving along a narrow walkway where wet pavement reflects the glow of overhead neon signs. As the camera emerges from the cover, the space opens into a wide street where the view tilts upward to reveal a towering red highrise draped in digital billboards and a glowing pink cylindrical advertisement. The scene then shifts toward a major intersection, turning right to cross multi-lane traffic past a prominent vertical billboard featuring a pink neon figure. Finally, the camera proceeds along a street lined with massive illuminated murals before coming to a halt at a yellow zebra crosswalk with the distant pedestrian bridge lingering in the background.
